name: Agenda board
description: Morning glance: clock, weather, and an iCal-fed calendar agenda. Configure weather like the standalone weather screen plus an iCal URL.

theme.description: Color scheme. Auto follows the device/OS preference.

font_family.description: Typeface for time, weather, and agenda text.

layout.description: split-2: clock and weather header with agenda below; split-3: three columns; stacked: vertical stack.

ical_url.description: Public iCal/ICS feed (CalDAV needs a proxy)
